action.reasoning: Observation: Val_ba=0.8422 on source domains but test balanced_accuracy=0.6199 on L100. Large gap indicates domain shift. Weak classes: bird (0.296), squirrel (0.209), cat (0.560), rabbit (0.500). Analysis: The model overfits to source domain features. Need better domain generalization. Key issues: (1) Only 5 epochs trained; (2) Need stronger augmentation; (3) Class imbalance - focal loss; (4) Consider using both CLS token and mean pooling. Decision: Train longer (20 epochs) with stronger augmentation, focal loss, larger resolution, and label smoothing. Also use cosine LR with warmup.
